review_title: Awesome CMS for team and web developers with smart integrations to marketing Apps
description: Working with this CMS is enjoyable both for me as a developer and IT manager and for our client who has little information about website management. I like granular permissions and I can control who controls and edits website pages and Multisite management are so useful for me.
author: Ali K.
pros: A project with a lot of content and a lot of complexity can be easily designed. Doug & Drop feature and add new users with a certain level of access to the marketing or design and development of your website will help you move things faster. It is compatible with all devices and supported by the reputable company Amazon and is by default in the AWS marketplace. Also, it has great integration with salesforce and it works great with Marketo digital marketing app.
cons: Sometimes the Drag and Drop feature does not work well, which may be due to the speed of the Internet and is fixed when I've refreshed the page, but the support team must be checked and fix it.

description: Solodev is an easy-to-use web content management system that can be a decent choice for small to medium-sized enterprises and digital marketing agencies, but it might not be appropriate for customers that require a high level of customization or for large, sophisticated websites.
author: Redley P.
pros: -User-friendly interface-Adaptive design-SEO management features-Modules and integrations
cons: -Limited scalability-Limited customization-Limited possibilities for development-reliance on the medium
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great custom solution, but difficult to use
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Everything is 100% custom, so if you dream it you can do it, theoretically.
cons: Because everything is custom, it's almost impossible to make minor adjustments without coding expertise or a large budget.

review_title: Solodev is locked-up, powerful, and trusted
description: Solodev has offered us a lot of flexibility, training, support, and design freedom, compared to other CMS [content management system] platforms. Through it, we had the right blend of options in order to confidently engage in whatever we imagined from a design standpoint, translating ideas into fully-functional websites. We use the Solodev platform with a lot of ease and flexibility on a daily basis. We're believers in it to the point of hosting our own website on the platform. This is a good way to illustrate to clients and prospects just how easy it is to use Solodev. Our staff is up to speed on it, but we can easily get a hold of their team when we have a question. Solodev is a dynamite way of working with a partner, instead of with a software vendor. We have consistently advocated and evangelized the power of Solodev as a CMS platform. There hasn't been a single implementation of the software that didn't allow the marketing personnel outside or inside of my organization to get up-to-speed quickly and start building things on their own. From an IT perspective, Solodev is a fantastic model because it's highly validated security-wise. I don't wrestle with the same dilemma of whether or not it's going to be hacked like I would with WordPress and open-source platforms. . Solodev is a locked-up, powerful, and trusted tool.
author: Matthew G.
pros: Solodev's team has been amenable to using whatever project management platform we had in place at the time, which may have been something like Basecamp, Slack, and other web-based applications. Solodev has an outstanding internal service model; I haven't had any issues with how our account managers are maintaining and managing our process. Solodev's team has been able to sink its teeth into anything we've asked for.
cons: A CMS can be somewhat of a commodity, and we could have a better vehicle for voicing improvement suggestions. I'd like to have more of a voice into how the software will grow and have more of an impact in the future. Solodev does have great communication with us throughout the lifespan of a project, so we'd like to see them embrace any areas in which they can grow.

review_title: Functional CMS, Reliable Staff and Creative Web Developers
description: My company has been working with Solodev for more than 4 years and every year gets better and better. We recently did a complete site redesign which as many know is a huge undertaking but Solodev was there with us every step of the way. From day 1 we had a vision of what we wanted our site to look like and how we wanted it to function and Solodev gave us all of that and more. The creative team is hands down the very best, and the support staff is very responsive. What I like most about working with Solodev is their willingness to work with you to give you exactly what you are envisioning. We were a little nervous about going onto a brand new CMS system but we are so glad we took the leap with Solodev because it is simply the best! Very functional and easy to use and we couldn't be happier with our finished product. We have already won awards for our new site and look forward to continuing to make it a better site as years go on!
author: Brittny K.
pros: Very user-friendly and easy to teach new staff members how to use.
cons: One of our struggles has been housing our photos within the CMS into a photo library that is easy to access. Solodev has been working with us to continue to make this process better and it has already come a long way.

review_title: Excellent service and even better outcome
author: Natalia L.
pros: Easy to use and the staff is amazing to work with. Very professional and efficient. Our goal was to increase traffic to our team's page on our site. In on month, after working with Solodev, we have seen an increase of over 100% to our page.

review_title: My experience working with Solodev has been excellent, the team is very helpful and responsive.
author: Francesca L.
pros: It's easy to navigate through the back-end and the pages are very simple to update. Seamless process for updating our website, especially like the blog layout.
cons: Initially it was a little bit challenging getting used to this software because myself and the team were accustom to the functionality of WordPress.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Solodev's CMS is an easy to use product for building your site. Everyone we work with at Solodev provides top notch customer support. They make you feel like family.
author: Matt F.

review_title: Solodev Delivers Amazing Website for SCPS
description: We utilized Solodev to help us build our new website for Seminole County Public Schools (SCPS). The Solodev team was tremendous to work with. The entire project stayed on budget and on-time. In fact, we launched earlier than we had anticipated thanks to their amazing dedication and hard work. Solodev delivered a site that is user-friendly, easy to navigate, visually-pleasing, and incorporates a variety of special features allowing us to better communicate to our constituents (students, parents, community, etc..). The Solodev CMS on the back-end is a breeze to use and makes it much simpler for our staff to update all aspects of the new site. We now have the ability to make necessary changes and edits instantly. Thus, keeping our content both current and fresh. We are extremely pleased with the entire web-design, launch and implementation process. We would highly recommend Solodev as a solution to any organization looking to develop a new site.
author: Michael L.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Solodev has helped us build a cutting edge website that is easy to manage and keep updated. The support staff at Solodev is always available to assist if we have any issues, and have provided valuable trainings to our new hires getting them up to speed. We have been a customer of Solodev's for over 10 years and have always been more than satisfied with their services.
author: Ashley P.
cons: Need some assistance in building out new pages

review_title: Solodev CMS la plataforma que te ayuda en gestiones
description: Con Solodev CMS he podido innovar y crear sitios web, además me ha ayudado en su gestión.
author: Jennifer Dayana M.
pros: Lo que más me ha gustado de Solodev CMS es que está en constante actualización para ofrecer lo mejor a sus clientes y puedes trabajar con la nube, creando e innovando aplicaciones.
cons: Lo que menos me ha gustado de Solodev CMS es le falta añadir alguna herramienta para que podamos usar los clientes.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Es perfecto para la creacción de páginas webs
description: En general la experiencia es buena, la recomiendo sobre todo para diseño web
author: José Carlos H.
pros: Lo que más me gusta de este programa es la facilidad de creación de páginas webs con inteligencia artificial
cons: Lo que no me gusta de software es la dificultad a veces de implementación.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Una buena alternativa para diseñar tu pagina web
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Es bastante abarcativo y personalizable debido a su cantidad inmensa de herramientas que posee.
cons: Suele ser medio complicado utilizarlo si no tienes experiencia con software similar mas sencillo.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Website development and ongoing software and development support
description: They did a super job building our website a year ago and now maintaining it and providing ongoing support for our online development.
author: Ray G.
cons: Can't identify any at this time

description: Solodev has provided us with software, support and design assistance for several years now. We just completed another website implementation with Solodev in 2016, and we couldn't be happier! Software is user-friendly, packed with features, and Solodev is always looking to improve upon their product. They have always been able to answer all our questions and provide awesome solutions.
author: Eric F.
